india.title: Korean proverb of the day: 'When whales fight, the shrimp’s back gets broken'
india.summary: A centuries-old Korean proverb, "When whales fight, the shrimp's back gets broken," vividly illustrates how the powerless suffer during conflicts between the influential. This timeless wisdom, originating from oral tradition, remains strikingly relevant today, applying to everything from international relations and corporate disputes to family struggles. Its enduring power lies in its simple yet potent imagery, reminding us that even seemingly distant battles have far-reaching consequences for the vulnerable.
